owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

canLiquidate(address,uint256,uint256).notice: Check if position can be liquidated

getCollateralConfig(address).notice: Get full collateral config for an asset

getLtv(address,address).notice: Get LTV for an asset (considering user's eMode)

getMaxBorrowable(address,address,uint256.notice: Calculate maximum borrowable amount in USD

isCollateralEnabled(address).notice: Check if asset can be used as collateral

isStableRateEnabled(address).notice: Check if stable rate borrowing is enabled

setFrozen(address,bool).notice: Freeze/unfreeze an asset (no new deposits when frozen)

setIsolationMode(address,bool,uint256).notice: Configure isolation mode for risky assets

setReserveFactor(address,uint256).notice: Set reserve factor (% of interest to protocol)

documentation.text:
@notice Initialize the pool address
 @param _pool Pool contract address
@notice Freeze/unfreeze an asset (no new deposits when frozen)
@notice Set reserve factor (% of interest to protocol)
@notice Configure isolation mode for risky assets

@notice Add efficiency mode category
 @dev EMode allows higher LTV for correlated assets
@notice Get full collateral config for an asset
@notice Get LTV for an asset (considering user's eMode)
@notice Check if asset can be used as collateral
@notice Check if stable rate borrowing is enabled
@notice Calculate maximum borrowable amount in USD
@notice Check if position can be liquidated

@title CollateralManager
 @notice Manages collateral configurations and health calculations
 @dev Handles LTV, liquidation thresholds, and collateral validation
 Key parameters:
 - LTV (Loan-to-Value): Max borrowing power as % of collateral
 - Liquidation Threshold: Collateral value % at which position is liquidatable
 - Liquidation Bonus: Discount given to liquidators (incentive)
 Security:
 - Tiered risk parameters by asset class
 - Reserve factor for protocol sustainability
 - Isolation mode for risky assets
